rawContent:
Based on the National Weather Service forecast for Seattle, Washington, here's **tomorrow's weather (Friday, March 21, 2026)**:

- **High Temperature:** 56°F
- **Low Temperature:** 41°F (overnight into Saturday)
- **Precipitation Chance:** 100% during the day, dropping to 40% in the evening
- **General Conditions:** Rain throughout most of the day, mainly before 2pm. Expect south-southwest winds at 11-15 mph. New precipitation amounts between 0.1 to 0.25 inches expected during the day, with showers possible in the evening before clearing up after midnight.

It will be a rainy day in Seattle, so bring an umbrella!
content:
**Tomorrow's Forecast: Friday, March 21, 2026 - Seattle, WA**

**Morning:** Rain throughout the morning with south-southwest winds 11-15 mph. Temperatures rising toward 56°F.

**Afternoon:** Rain continuing, mainly before 2pm. Expect 0.1-0.25 inches of precipitation. High of 56°F.

**Evening:** Rain tapering off with 40% chance of showers. Conditions clearing after midnight. Low dropping to 41°F overnight.

Bring an umbrella for most of the day. Winds steady from the south-southwest at 11-15 mph.
